archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast (Archetype 4) mixed with organic trust elements

button.primary: bg-[#111827] text-white hover:bg-[#000000] rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold
button.accent: bg-[#059669] text-white hover:bg-[#047857] rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold
button.secondary: bg-white text-[#111827] border border-[#E5E7EB] hover:border-[#111827] rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold

components.card: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-black/5 p-8 shadow-[0_4px_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.02)]
components.input: w-full bg-[#F9F9FB] border border-[#E5E7EB] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 focus:border-[#059669] focus:bg-white focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#059669] transition-all
components.nav_bar: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-black/5

images.description: Smiling Indian professional using phone, perfect for hero section trust building
Abstract white geometric background for landing page or marketing sections
Minimalist financial chart abstract for the dashboard or loan recommendation engine

instructions_to_main_agent: Install `lucide-react` for crisp icons (1.5 stroke width).
Use Google Fonts for 'Outfit' and 'Manrope'. Add them via HTML link tags or standard imports.
Strictly follow the color palette. Backgrounds should be white or #F9F9FB. No generic gray borders; use black/5.
Headers must be sticky with glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80).
For multi-step onboarding, use Framer Motion for smooth slide transitions between steps. Keep the UI extremely clean with max width containers for focus.
Data-testid attributes MUST be added to all interactive elements.
Shadcn UI components should be heavily customized. Override standard Vercel borders and radiuses. Make them rounded-xl or rounded-2xl.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Outfit' for headings, with tight tracking.
For the Privacy & Trust Layer, use the Emerald Green accent and security icons to establish a safe environment.
For the AI Suggestion feature, use a subtle shimmering border or gradient text to indicate AI presence, avoiding full neon aesthetics.
